global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text promoting a sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape deal at a special price.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: WayPoint SALE
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the words 'WayPoint SALE' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Medium-sized text in the center of the ad that reads 'Escape this weekend', conveying a sense of urgency.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€29.99' in a larger font, emphasizing the cost of the offer.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A button-like text at the bottom that says 'Watch now', encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon located at the bottom left, adding visual interest without being a focal point.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small decorative icon at the bottom center, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon at the bottom right, enhancing the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Text below the main offer that reads 'special fares today', providing additional context.
